targets.rawSql:
select DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) as time
, max(ServerName) as ServerName
, max(CounterValue) as CounterValue 
from (
SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 5 * 5, 0) AS time
     , ServerName
     , ROUND(avg(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
     -- , ROUND(MAX(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
  FROM (SELECT pef.CollectDate AS time
             , ins.ServerName as ServerName
             , pef.CounterValue as CounterValue
             , row_number() over(partition by ServerName, collectDate order by collectDate desc) as rnk
          FROM [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] AS ins 
         INNER JOIN [dbo].[TBL2_M_Perfmon] AS pef 
            ON ins.InstanceID = pef.InstanceID
         WHERE pef.CounterName = 'Processor\% Processor Time(_Total)' 
           AND ins.ServerName IN ($ServerName)
           AND ins.UseYN = 'Y'
           AND pef.CollectDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
       ) z 
 WHERE rnk = 1
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 5 * 5, 0), ServerName
) z
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0), ServerName
ORDER BY time

select DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) as time
, max(ServerName) as ServerName
, max(CounterValue) as CounterValue 
from (
SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 10 * 10, 0) AS time
     , ServerName
     , ROUND(avg(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
     -- , ROUND(MAX(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
  FROM (SELECT pef.CollectDate AS time
             , ins.ServerName as ServerName
             , pef.CounterValue as CounterValue
             , row_number() over(partition by ServerName, collectDate order by collectDate desc) as rnk
          FROM [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] AS ins 
         INNER JOIN [dbo].[TBL2_M_Perfmon] AS pef 
            ON ins.InstanceID = pef.InstanceID
         WHERE pef.CounterName = 'Processor\% Processor Time(_Total)' 
           AND ins.ServerName IN ($ServerName)
           AND ins.UseYN = 'Y'
           AND pef.CollectDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
       ) z 
 WHERE rnk = 1
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 10 * 10, 0), ServerName
) z
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0), ServerName
ORDER BY time

select DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) as time
, max(ServerName) as ServerName
, max(CounterValue) as CounterValue 
from (
SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 5 * 5, 0) AS time
     , ServerName
     , ROUND(MAX(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
     -- , ROUND(MAX(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
  FROM (SELECT pef.CollectDate AS time
             , ins.ServerName as ServerName
             , ( (CONVERT(decimal, LEFT(sbi.PhysicalMemory, CHARINDEX(' ', sbi.PhysicalMemory))) - pef.CounterValue) 
                / CONVERT(decimal, LEFT(sbi.PhysicalMemory, CHARINDEX(' ', sbi.PhysicalMemory))) ) * 100.0 AS CounterValue
             , row_number() over(partition by ins.ServerName, pef.collectDate order by pef.collectDate desc) as rnk
          FROM [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] AS ins 
         INNER JOIN [dbo].[TBL2_M_Perfmon] AS pef 
            ON ins.InstanceID = pef.InstanceID
         INNER JOIN  [dbo].[TBL2_M_ServerBasicInfo] AS sbi 
            ON pef.InstanceID = sbi.InstanceID AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), sbi.CollectDate, 112) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112)
         WHERE pef.CounterName = 'Memory\Available MBytes' 
           AND ins.ServerName IN ($ServerName)
           AND ins.UseYN = 'Y'
           AND pef.CollectDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
       ) z 
 WHERE rnk = 1
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 5 * 5, 0), ServerName
) z
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0), ServerName
ORDER BY time

select DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0) as time
, max(ServerName) as ServerName
, max(CounterValue) as CounterValue 
from (
SELECT DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 5 * 5, 0) AS time
     , ServerName
     , ROUND(avg(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
     -- , ROUND(MAX(CounterValue),2) AS CounterValue
  FROM (SELECT pef.CollectDate AS time
             , ins.ServerName as ServerName
             , pef.CounterValue as CounterValue
             , row_number() over(partition by ServerName, collectDate order by collectDate desc) as rnk
          FROM [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] AS ins 
         INNER JOIN [dbo].[TBL2_M_Perfmon] AS pef 
            ON ins.InstanceID = pef.InstanceID
         WHERE pef.CounterName = 'Processor\% Processor Time(_Total)' 
           AND ins.ServerName IN ($ServerName)
           AND ins.UseYN = 'Y'
           AND pef.CollectDate BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
       ) z 
 WHERE rnk = 1
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / 5 * 5, 0), ServerName
) z
GROUP BY DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, TIME) / $TimeRangeGroup * $TimeRangeGroup, 0), ServerName
ORDER BY time

SELECT 'MD' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '마케팅' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '경영지원' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '재무' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT 'POS' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '상품권' AS PartName
UNION
SELECT '인프라' AS PartName

list.definition:
SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) < 1*60*24 THEN 1
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  1*60*24 AND   2*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 2  *60*24 THEN 30
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  2*60*24 AND  30*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 30 *60*24 THEN 60
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN 30*60*24 AND 365*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 365*60*24 THEN 180
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) >= 365*60*24 THEN 720
        END
list.name: TimeRangeGroup
list.query:
SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) < 1*60*24 THEN 1
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  1*60*24 AND   2*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 2  *60*24 THEN 30
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN  2*60*24 AND  30*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 30 *60*24 THEN 60
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) BETWEEN 30*60*24 AND 365*60*24 AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) <> 365*60*24 THEN 180
            WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, $__timeFrom(), $__timeTo()) >= 365*60*24 THEN 720
        END
